title: Mermaid graph generator for Kodex topic relationships
purpose: Provides utilities to parse topic relationships from markdown, build graph edges, and generate Mermaid syntax for visualizing topic connections.
module_context: Exports interfaces for GraphEdge, GraphNode, and GraphData, along with functions to parse related topics, build graph edges, and generate Mermaid graph syntax.

steps.content: Validate that the input text is a non-empty string.
Use a regular expression to find all backtick-wrapped topic names.
Extract the topic names by removing the backticks from matches.
Remove duplicate topic names to ensure uniqueness.
Return the array of unique topic names.

methods.name: buildGraphEdges
methods.normalized_params: (topics: Array<{ name: string; related?: string }>): GraphEdge[]

steps.content: Initialize an empty array to collect graph edges.
Iterate over each topic in the input array.
Skip topics that do not have a related field.
Parse the related field to extract referenced topic names.
Create edges from the current topic to each referenced topic.
Return the array of graph edges.

methods.name: generateMermaidGraph
methods.normalized_params: (edges: GraphEdge[], topics: Map<string, { title: string; name: string }>): string

steps.content: Initialize an array to hold the lines of Mermaid syntax.
Collect all node names from the edges to determine connected nodes.
Define each node in the graph with its label based on title or name.
Define edges between nodes using the source and target names.
Join all lines with newlines to form the complete Mermaid graph syntax.
Return the generated Mermaid graph syntax as a string.
